utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items. Each item is fully specified: the property section includes type, location, size, price, and features; financing includes method, down payment, mortgage amount, interest rate, term, and documentation; legal_services includes provider, cost, included services, duration, and completion target; moving_services includes service level, cost, included services, and timeline; setup_services includes package, cost, included services, timeline, and smart_home_integration; total_budget includes all costs and a grand total. Therefore, all six items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final property solution shows a purchase (not rental) in Downtown Toronto: a 2-bedroom, 1-bathroom condo priced at CAD $485,000. Among the ground-truth purchase options, the closest match by price and description is 'New Build' (CAD $480K), which has a rating of 10. For financing, the AI used a 'Joint mortgage' with 10% down payment and 5-year term. The ground-truth purchase financing options include 'First-Time Buyer' (rating 10) and 'Traditional Mortgage' (rating 8). Since the AI did not specify 'First-Time Buyer' but used a regular mortgage structure, 'Traditional Mortgage' fits best (rating 8). The legal service chosen was 'Premium Legal Package', which has a rating of 8. The moving service chosen was 'Standard with packing included' at CAD $650, matching 'Standard Moving' with rating 9. For setup services, the AI selected 'Basic to Premium utilities' at CAD $120 — this aligns with 'Basic Utilities' (rating 6).
